# update(notification:)

**Instance Method**

Updates a notification with new content.

## Declaration

```swift
func update(notification: AccessoryNotification)
```

## Parameters

- **notification**: A notification containing updated details.

## Discussion

Accessories don’t need to alert the person for notification updates.
title: update(notification:)
